description.en:
The smooth and sophisticated lines of the TOTO LB 1.2 GPM Two Handle Bathroom Sink Faucet create a modern twist on a classic design. This faucet features TOTO's innovative COMFORT GLIDE Technology that utilizes Diamond-Like Carbon coated ceramic cartridges for ultimate durability and protection against friction. This allows the user to control water flow in comfort with long-lasting ease of use. The LB faucet uses low-conductivity materials for parts that come into contact with the handles, providing a safe design that inhibits the heat flow and keeps the handles from getting too warm. The WaterSense certified, high-efficiency 1.2 GPM water flow saves water without diminishing the performance of the faucet. The faucet is ADA, CEC, and CALGreen compliant. Included items: Spout and handles, metal pop-up drain and rod, and water supply hoses

  • HANDLE DOESN'T STICK OR BECOME LOOSE OVER TIME - COMFORT GLIDE ceramic discs feature a Diamond-Like Carbon coating, protecting against friction and ensuring long-lasting operability. A lifetime of smooth handle control at your fingertips.
  • LUXURY EXEMPLIFIED - For over 100 years, TOTO has made a reputation for using the finest quality materials. Faucet spouts and handles are solid metal and feature a durable finish. NEVER WORRY ABOUT TOUCHING A HOT HANDLE - Safe, low-conductivity materials are selected to prevent handles from getting too warm.
  • SIMPLE INSTALLATION - Installation is a breeze with the included water supply hoses. The faucet can be installed into a single-hole deck or a 4 hole configuration with the purchase of a separately sold cover plate.
  • WATER SAVINGS WITHOUT SACRIFICING PERFORMANCE - The WaterSense certified and CEC compliant faucet uses 1.2 gallons of water per minute, offering water savings with no compromise to your shower experience. The Faucet is ADA compliant.
  • LIFETIME WARRANTY - TOTO residential shower and faucets are backed by our Limited Lifetime Warranty. Quality you can depend on and top notch customer service from a company you can trust.

description.en:
The TOTO Helix AC Powered 0.5 GPM Touchless Bathroom Faucet with Mixing Valve, 20 Second Continuous Flow is ideal for high-traffic spaces, providing an elegant water conservation solution. The sensor is strategically positioned underneath the spout head to accurately sense the hands for touchless use. The 0.5 GPM 20 second continuous flow faucet uses only 0.17 gallons per cycle and is CEC and CALGreen compliant. The water will flow continuously for 20 seconds, preventing water waste from the faucet being left running. The included mixing valve allows for water temperature adjustment. Easy installation and low-cost maintenance makes this faucet practical, sustainable, and durable. The ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience while saving water. Included items: spout, operating controller, mixing valve, and mounting hardware included. Purchased separately: water supply line for G 1/2 inch connection. Requires 120V AC power supply.

  • WATER FLOWS EASILY WITHOUT SEARCHING FOR THE SENSOR - The sensor is strategically positioned underneath the spout head to accurately sense the hands for touchless use. The sensor is concealed within the spout body for a beautiful aesthetic.
  • STOPS AUTOMATICALLY TO PREVENT WATER WASTE - The water will flow continuously for 20 seconds before automatically stopping. When hands are present, the water will flow. When hands are removed, the water will flow for 20 seconds before stopping.
  • EXCELLENCE IN WATER SAVINGS - The 0.5 GPM 20 second continuous flow faucet uses only 0.17 gallons per cycle and is CEC and CALGreen compliant. The ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience while saving water.
  • SET YOUR PREFERRED TEMPERATURE - The included mixing valve allows for simple water temperature adjustment.
  • EASY INSTALLATION AND LOW-COST MAINTENANCE - Included items: spout, operating controller, mixing valve, and mounting hardware included. Purchased separately: water supply line for G 1/2 inch connection.

description.en:
The TOTO Helix AC Powered 0.5 GPM Touchless Bathroom Faucet with Mixing Valve, 10 Second On-Demand Flow is ideal for high-traffic spaces, providing an elegant water conservation solution. The sensor is strategically positioned underneath the spout head to accurately sense the hands for touchless use. The 0.5 GPM 10 second on-demand faucet uses only 0.08 gallons per cycle and is CEC and CALGreen compliant. The on-demand system means that water flows only when needed and cannot be accidentally left running. When hands are present, the water will flow, and when hands are removed, the water will stop. The included mixing valve allows for water temperature adjustment. Easy installation and low-cost maintenance makes this faucet practical, sustainable, and durable. The ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience while saving water. Included items: spout, operating controller, mixing valve, and mounting hardware included. Purchased separately: water supply line for G 1/2 inch connection. Requires 120V AC power supply.

  • WATER FLOWS EASILY WITHOUT SEARCHING FOR THE SENSOR - The sensor is strategically positioned underneath the spout head to accurately sense the hands for touchless use. The sensor is concealed within the spout body for a beautiful aesthetic.
  • STOPS AUTOMATICALLY TO PREVENT WATER WASTE - The on-demand system allows water flow only when needed. When hands are present, the water will flow. When hands are removed, the water will stop.
  • EXCELLENCE IN WATER SAVINGS - The 0.5 GPM 10 second on-demand faucet uses only 0.08 gallons per cycle and is CEC and CALGreen compliant. The ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience while saving water.
  • SET YOUR PREFERRED TEMPERATURE - The included mixing valve allows for simple water temperature adjustment.
  • EASY INSTALLATION AND LOW-COST MAINTENANCE - Included items: spout, operating controller, mixing valve, and mounting hardware included. Purchased separately: water supply line for G 1/2 inch connection.

description.en:
The TOTO Standard S AC Powered 0.5 GPM Touchless Bathroom Faucet with Mixing Valve, 10 Second On-Demand Flow is ideal for high-traffic spaces, providing an elegant water conservation solution. The sensor is strategically positioned underneath the spout head to accurately sense the hands for touchless use. The 0.5 GPM 10 second on-demand faucet uses only 0.08 gallons per cycle and is CEC and CALGreen compliant. The on-demand system means that water flows only when needed and cannot be accidentally left running. When hands are present, the water will flow, and when hands are removed, the water will stop. The included mixing valve allows for water temperature adjustment. Easy installation and low-cost maintenance makes this faucet practical, sustainable, and durable. The ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience while saving water. Included items: spout, operating controller, mixing valve, and mounting hardware included. Purchased separately: water supply line for G 1/2 inch connection. Requires 120V AC power supply.

  • WATER FLOWS EASILY WITHOUT SEARCHING FOR THE SENSOR - The sensor is strategically positioned underneath the spout head to accurately sense the hands for touchless use. The sensor is concealed within the spout body for a beautiful aesthetic.
  • STOPS AUTOMATICALLY TO PREVENT WATER WASTE - The on-demand system allows water flow only when needed. When hands are present, the water will flow. When hands are removed, the water will stop.
  • EXCELLENCE IN WATER SAVINGS - The 0.5 GPM 10 second on-demand faucet uses only 0.08 gallons per cycle and is CEC and CALGreen compliant. The ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience while saving water.
  • SET YOUR PREFERRED TEMPERATURE - The included mixing valve allows for simple water temperature adjustment.
  • EASY INSTALLATION AND LOW-COST MAINTENANCE - Included items: spout, operating controller, mixing valve, and mounting hardware included. Purchased separately: water supply line for G 1/2 inch connection.

description.en:
The BauLoop Single-Handle Bathroom Faucet from GROHE is defined by its sleek, contemporary profile and innovative German engineering. With its unique slanted spout, the BauLoop single-hole faucet is designed to enhance comfort by directing water flow at an outward angle for easier use and accessibility. Combining practicality and safety, the BauLoop bathroom faucet has an inner waterway that guides water through a safe, separate channel, ensuring water never comes into contact with lead or nickel. For added safety, the BauLoop faucet features GROHE CoolTouch technology to effectively prevent accidental scalding. The BauLoop single-handle faucet is an exceptional value, delivering superior design and the advanced technology that are hallmarks of every GROHE faucet.

  • SINGLE-HOLE FAUCET: Single-handle bathroom faucet is a sleek, contemporary style
  • ANGLED AERATOR: Directs water flow outward toward hands for added ease and convenience
  • DRIP-FREE: German engineered bathroom faucet with quality ceramic disc valve to ensure leak-proof performance
  • METAL CONSTRUCTION: Durable metal spout and handle
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Can also be used on a 1- or 3-hole sink or vanity with deck plate, sold separately. Nylon braided flex hoses are included.
  • SMOOTH HANDLE OPERATION: Features GROHE SilkMove for precise handle control
  • LEAD-FREE SAFETY: The inner waterways of the GROHE Zero design prevent water from coming into contact with metal material
  • HELPS PREVENT SCALDING: GROHE CoolTouch technology ensures the faucet body will never exceed the temperature of the water
  • CONSERVES WATER: GROHE EcoJoy technology allows for less water usage without sacrificing performance
  • DURABLE FINISHES: GROHE StarLight coating maintains luster on brushed and polished finishes;LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY: GROHE warranties this bathroom faucet to be free of manufacturer defects, your assurance of quality design and performance

description.en:
Hansgrohe 04370000 Focus 70 Single Hole Faucet in Chrome

Elevate your bathroom with the sleek, modern design of the Hansgrohe Focus 70 Single Hole Faucet. This fixture combines elegant aesthetics with superior German engineering to deliver exceptional performance and lasting reliability. The brilliant chrome finish adds a touch of sophistication to any decor, while its user-friendly features make it an ideal choice for both residential renovations and large-scale commercial projects. Experience the perfect blend of form and function that only Hansgrohe can provide, ensuring your installation is both beautiful and built to last.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 04370000
  • Finish: Chrome
  • Installation: Single-hole
  • Flow Rate: 1.2 GPM
  • Handle Type: Lever
  • Spout Height: 2 3/4"
  • Spout Reach: 4"
  • Drain Assembly: Pop-up drain included
  • Valve: Ceramic cartridge
  • Certification: cUPC listed

Effortless Operation and Sleek Design

The Focus 70 faucet features a single-lever handle that provides smooth, precise control over both water temperature and volume. Its minimalist design is engineered for simplicity and ease of use, making it an excellent choice for any modern bathroom. The clean lines and compact form factor ensure it complements a wide range of sink styles without overpowering the space, offering a refined look for your project.

Superior Water Efficiency with ComfortZone

Engineered with Hansgrohe's innovative ComfortZone 70 technology, this faucet offers ample space for handwashing and daily routines. The spout height and reach are perfectly balanced for comfortable use. Furthermore, the integrated aerator provides a full, yet soft water spray while operating at a highly efficient 1.2 GPM flow rate. This helps reduce water consumption and lower utility costs without sacrificing performance, a key benefit for property managers and homeowners alike.

Lasting Durability and Simple Installation

Constructed from high-quality solid brass and finished with a durable chrome coating, the Hansgrohe Focus 70 is designed to resist corrosion, tarnish, and scratches for years of flawless service. The included ceramic disc cartridge ensures drip-free operation and long-term reliability. Installation is straightforward with flexible connections, making it a time-saving solution for contractors and DIY enthusiasts completing new builds or upgrades.

Additional Features

  • Solid brass construction ensures long-lasting durability.
  • Includes a matching pop-up drain assembly for a complete, coordinated look.
  • EcoRight technology reduces water consumption by up to 60%.
  • QuickClean anti-limescale function allows for easy removal of mineral deposits.
  • Suitable for both residential and commercial applications.
  • Backed by Hansgrohe's limited lifetime warranty for peace of mind.

description.en:
Hansgrohe Focus Widespread Faucet 100 in Chrome

Upgrade your next bathroom project with the Hansgrohe Focus Widespread Faucet 100. Finished in a classic Chrome, this fixture delivers a clean, modern aesthetic that is both stylish and highly functional. It’s an ideal choice for contractors and property managers seeking a cost-effective, reliable faucet that offers premium quality and lasting performance for any residential or commercial installation.

Engineered for precision and durability, the Focus faucet provides an exceptional user experience. The dual lever handles offer smooth, tactile control, powered by high-quality 90-degree ceramic valves that guarantee drip-free operation and effortless adjustments for years to come. Its widespread 3-hole design creates an elegant, uncluttered look on the countertop, making it a smart and attractive addition to any bathroom.

The Hansgrohe Focus is designed with both efficiency and convenience in mind. Featuring innovative ComfortZone technology, it provides ample space for comfortable use, while its water-saving 1.2 GPM flow rate meets WaterSense criteria, helping to reduce utility costs without sacrificing performance. The QuickClean feature allows for the easy removal of limescale, ensuring a perfect aerated stream and simplifying maintenance. This faucet also includes a matching pop-up drain for a complete, cohesive installation.

Key Features and Benefits:

  • Modern Widespread Design: The 3-hole configuration offers a clean, contemporary look that enhances any bathroom vanity or countertop.
  • Durable Brushed Nickel Finish: A high-quality, corrosion-resistant finish provides a warm, elegant look that is easy to maintain and built to last.
  • Precise, Drip-Free Control: Equipped with 90° ceramic valves, the dual lever handles deliver smooth, reliable performance and prevent leaks.
  • Enhanced User Comfort: Hansgrohe’s ComfortZone 100 technology creates a convenient and comfortable space between the spout and sink.
  • Water-Efficient Performance: A 1.2 GPM flow rate conserves water and reduces project operating costs while delivering a satisfying aerated spray.
  • Complete Installation Kit: This faucet comes with a matching pop-up drain, connection hoses, and all necessary mounting hardware for a quick, secure setup.

Specifications:

  • Model: 04369000
  • Finish: Chrome
  • Installation Type: Widespread (3-hole)
  • Flow Rate: 1.2 GPM (WaterSense certified)
  • Valve Type: 90-Degree Ceramic Valves
  • Included Components: Pop-up drain, connection hoses, mounting set

Choose the Hansgrohe Focus Widespread Faucet for a perfect balance of modern design, reliable engineering, and exceptional value. Secure this premium fixture for your next project and deliver a bathroom experience defined by lasting quality and style.

description.en:
Hansgrohe 04371000 Focus 100 Single Hole Faucet in Chrome

Elevate your bathroom with the sleek design and superior performance of the Hansgrohe Focus 100 Single Hole Faucet. This modern bathroom faucet combines elegant aesthetics with innovative German engineering to deliver an exceptional user experience. The sophisticated chrome finish adds a touch of contemporary class, making it a perfect centerpiece for any residential or commercial restroom renovation. Its single-hole installation provides a clean, uncluttered look while offering reliable, long-lasting functionality.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 04371000
  • Finish: Chrome
  • Series: Focus
  • Flow Rate: 1.2 GPM
  • Spout Height: 4-1/8"
  • Spout Reach: 4-1/2"
  • Installation Type: Single Hole
  • Handle Type: Lever
  • Valve Type: Ceramic Cartridge
  • Aerator Type: Laminar Spray
  • Certifications: cUPC, ADA Compliant, WaterSense

EcoSmart Technology for Maximum Efficiency

Save water and reduce utility costs without sacrificing performance. This Hansgrohe Focus 100 faucet is equipped with EcoSmart technology, which limits the flow rate to an efficient 1.2 gallons per minute. This intelligent feature reduces water consumption by up to 60% compared to conventional faucets, making it an environmentally responsible and cost-effective choice for any project.

QuickClean for Easy Maintenance

Keep your faucet looking pristine with minimal effort. The QuickClean anti-limescale function allows you to wipe away mineral deposits from the flexible silicone aerator with just a finger. This simple maintenance process ensures a perfect, long-lasting water stream and significantly reduces cleaning time, a valuable benefit for both property managers and homeowners.

ComfortZone for Enhanced Usability

Experience superior comfort and flexibility at your sink. The ComfortZone 100 design provides ample space between the spout and the basin, making everyday tasks like hand washing or filling vessels easier and more comfortable. This thoughtful engineering creates a more user-friendly and functional washing area, accommodating a wide range of needs.

Additional Features

  • Solid brass construction ensures durability and reliability for long-term use.
  • The smooth, single-lever handle offers precise control over water temperature and volume.
  • A high-quality ceramic cartridge guarantees leak-free operation and dependable performance.
  • The laminar spray creates a clear, non-splashing water stream for a cleaner sink area.
  • ADA compliance ensures the faucet is accessible and easy to use for individuals with disabilities.

description.en:
Hansgrohe Focus 240 Tall Single Hole Faucet in Brushed Nickel

Elevate your bathroom design with the impressive scale and functionality of the Hansgrohe Focus 240 Tall Single Hole Faucet. Finished in a brilliant, brushed nickel, this fixture’s striking height and modern silhouette make it the perfect centerpiece for vessel sinks and contemporary vanities. For contractors and property managers, the Focus 240 offers a high-end look and world-class engineering at an exceptional value, ensuring your project stands out.

This faucet is designed to deliver superior flexibility and user comfort. It features a 120-degree swivel spout, providing an extended range of motion that makes washing and cleaning effortless. The innovative ComfortZone 240 technology creates a generous, unobstructed space between the spout and sink, offering maximum convenience for daily use. A single lever handle, powered by a high-quality ceramic cartridge, ensures smooth, precise, and drip-free control over water temperature and flow for a lifetime of reliable performance.

Engineered for modern efficiency, the Focus 240 operates at a water-saving 1.2 GPM flow rate, meeting strict WaterSense criteria to reduce utility costs without sacrificing a satisfying water experience. Installation is simplified with its single-hole design and an included pop-up drain, providing a complete solution for a quick and secure setup. The QuickClean anti-limescale feature allows you to simply wipe away mineral deposits, keeping the aerated stream perfect and maintenance to a minimum.

Key Features and Benefits:

  • Tall, Modern Profile: The impressive height is specifically designed for use with vessel sinks, creating a dramatic and sophisticated focal point.
  • Flexible Swivel Spout: A 120° swivel range offers enhanced flexibility and convenience, making it easier to direct water exactly where it’s needed.
  • Maximum User Comfort: Hansgrohe’s ComfortZone 240 provides an expansive and practical workspace, perfect for filling containers or washing hair.
  • Brilliant Chrome Finish: The durable, corrosion-resistant chrome finish offers a lasting, reflective shine that is easy to clean and maintain.
  • Reliable, Drip-Free Operation: A premium ceramic cartridge guarantees consistently smooth handle movement and prevents leaks, ensuring long-term value.
  • Water-Efficient Performance: The 1.2 GPM flow rate conserves water and lowers operating costs, delivering savings on any residential or commercial project.
  • Complete Installation Kit: Includes a matching pop-up drain, connection hoses, and all necessary mounting hardware for a straightforward installation.

Specifications:

  • Model:  31609821
  • Finish: Brushed Nickel
  • Installation Type: Tall Single-hole
  • Flow Rate: 1.2 GPM (WaterSense certified)
  • Spout Function: 120° Swivel Range
  • Valve Type: Ceramic Cartridge
  • Included Components: Pop-up drain, connection hoses, mounting set

Choose the Hansgrohe Focus 240 for a faucet that combines bold design with practical innovation. It’s the ideal solution for any project that demands reliability, efficiency, and standout style.

description.en:
Hansgrohe Metris 110 Single Hole Faucet in Brushed Nickel

Bring a touch of modern sophistication to your next project with the Hansgrohe Metris 110 Single Hole Faucet. Finished in a beautiful, resilient Brushed Nickel, this fixture combines a sleek, minimalist design with the exceptional engineering Hansgrohe is known for. It's the perfect selection for contractors, property managers, and discerning homeowners looking to install a reliable, high-quality faucet that delivers on both style and performance.

Experience the perfect harmony of form and function. The Metris 110 is equipped with Hansgrohe's innovative ComfortZone technology, offering an ideal height for everyday convenience and ample room for washing. The ergonomic single lever handle provides effortless control over water temperature and flow, backed by a premium ceramic cartridge that ensures years of smooth, drip-free operation. This faucet is built to withstand the demands of both busy residential and commercial bathrooms.

Engineered for efficiency and convenience, the Metris 110 operates at a water-saving 1.2 GPM flow rate, meeting WaterSense criteria to help reduce utility costs on any project without compromising performance. Installation is streamlined thanks to its single-hole design, and the included pop-up drain ensures a complete, cohesive look right out of the box. Plus, the QuickClean feature allows for simple removal of limescale, keeping the stream perfect and maintenance minimal.

Key Features and Benefits:

  • Sleek, Modern Design: The single-hole configuration and clean lines create a contemporary aesthetic perfect for any modern bathroom.
  • Durable Brushed Nickel Finish: A high-quality, corrosion-resistant finish offers a warm, elegant look that stands up to daily use and is easy to clean.
  • Enhanced User Comfort: Hansgrohe’s ComfortZone 110 provides a practical and comfortable space between the spout and sink for all your washing needs.
  • Reliable, Drip-Free Performance: The premium ceramic cartridge delivers smooth handle operation and guarantees a lifetime of leak-free use, providing peace of mind for any installation.
  • Water-Efficient Operation: With a flow rate of 1.2 GPM, this faucet conserves water and lowers operating costs while providing a satisfying aerated spray.
  • Complete and Ready for Installation: This faucet includes a matching pop-up drain, connection hoses, and all necessary mounting hardware for a secure and straightforward setup.

Specifications:

  • Model: 31080821
  • Finish: Brushed Nickel
  • Installation Type: Single-hole
  • Flow Rate: 1.2 GPM (WaterSense certified)
  • Valve Type: Ceramic Cartridge
  • Included Components: Pop-up drain, connection hoses, mounting set

Choose the Hansgrohe Metris 110 for a faucet that perfectly balances striking design, durable construction, and efficient performance. Its combination of reliable luxury and lasting value makes it a superior choice for any build or renovation.

description.en:
Hansgrohe Metris Single-Hole Faucet 200 in Chrome

Elevate your next bathroom project with the sophisticated design and superior functionality of the Hansgrohe Metris Single-Hole Faucet 200. Presented in a brilliant chrome finish, this faucet features a tall, elegant profile specifically designed for vessel sinks, providing a stunning visual anchor for any contemporary bathroom. For contractors and property managers, it represents an investment in lasting quality, combining world-class engineering with a striking aesthetic that clients will appreciate.

Discover the perfect blend of form and function with this meticulously engineered fixture. The Metris 200 features Hansgrohe's innovative ComfortZone technology, offering an extended height that creates ample space for washing hands, filling containers, and other daily tasks with unparalleled ease. At its core, a high-quality ceramic cartridge powers the single lever handle, delivering smooth, precise, and drip-free control over water temperature and flow for a lifetime of reliable use.

Designed for modern efficiency, this faucet operates with a water-saving flow rate of 1.2 GPM, meeting WaterSense criteria to help reduce utility costs without sacrificing performance. Its solid brass construction ensures lasting durability, while the QuickClean feature allows for the simple removal of limescale, ensuring a perfect aerated stream and easy maintenance. The streamlined single-hole design and included pop-up drain provide a complete, reliable solution that simplifies installation.

Key Features and Benefits:

  • Elegant Tall Design: The elevated profile is perfectly suited for vessel sinks, creating a dramatic, high-end look in any modern bathroom.
  • Superior User Comfort: Hansgrohe’s ComfortZone 200 provides an expansive and practical area between the spout and sink, maximizing convenience.
  • Brilliant Chrome Finish: A durable, corrosion-resistant chrome finish offers a lasting, reflective shine that is easy to clean and maintains its pristine look for years.
  • Precision Performance: The high-quality ceramic cartridge ensures consistently smooth and reliable control of water flow, preventing costly leaks and drips.
  • Water-Efficient Operation: With a flow rate of 1.2 GPM, this faucet is WaterSense certified, helping to reduce water consumption and save on project utility costs.
  • Complete and Convenient: Includes a matching pop-up drain and all necessary components for a straightforward and secure installation.

Specifications:

  • Model: 31183001
  • Finish: Chrome
  • Installation Type: Tall Single-hole
  • Flow Rate: 1.2 GPM (WaterSense certified)
  • Valve Type: Ceramic Cartridge
  • Included Components: Pop-up drain, connection hoses, mounting hardware

description.en:
Transform Your Bathroom with the TOTO TLE03502U1 0.5 GPM / 10-Second ECOPOWER Faucet Controller (On-Demand)

Power your touchless lav faucet without batteries or wiring. The TOTO TLE03502U1 ECOPOWER controller is a below-deck, self-generating valve that delivers a 10-second on-demand cycle at 0.5 GPM—just 0.08 gallons per use. It pairs with compatible TOTO ECOPOWER spouts to create a hygienic, low-maintenance solution for high-traffic restrooms while meeting strict conservation targets.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: TLE03502U1
  • Type: ECOPOWER on-demand touchless faucet controller (below-deck)
  • Size/Capacity: 0.5 GPM max; 10-second cycle (0.08 gpc)
  • Material/Finish: Concealed controller module; non-finish component (pairs with TOTO ECOPOWER spouts)
  • Performance: Self-powered hydroturbine (no batteries/wiring); sensor logic via spout; min. flowing pressure 15 psi, max static 80 psi; operating water temp 39–110 °F
  • Connections/Fit: G 1/2 (1/2? NPSM-compatible) water supply/interface; use with TOTO mixing valve (TLM10 manual or TLE05701U thermostatic) if hot/cold blending is required
  • Dimensions: Approx. 4.19? L × 4.44? W × 5.81? H (controller body)
  • Included: Controller and mounting hardware (spout, supply lines, and mixing valve sold separately)
  • Certifications: Meets/Exceeds ASME A112.18.1/CSA B125.1; NSF/ANSI 372; IAPMO cUPC; CEC & CALGreen (0.5 GPM/10-sec on-demand); ADA when installed with compliant spout
  • Warranty: 3-year limited (commercial; see TOTO terms)

Save Water & Energy

ECOPOWER harvests energy from water flow to power the electronics—no batteries to change and no external power to run. The 0.5 GPM / 10-sec on-demand cycle uses only 0.08 gallons per use, supporting CEC and CALGreen mandates without sacrificing usability.

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

Water flows only while hands are present, then stops—reducing waste and preventing accidental run-on. Self-adjusting sensor logic in the paired spout provides responsive activation across real-world sink layouts and lighting.

Durable, Low-Upkeep Design

A sealed, below-deck controller keeps critical components protected and out of sight. With no batteries, scheduled power maintenance drops to near zero—ideal for schools, offices, and public venues.

Installer-Friendly Integration

Standard G 1/2 (½? NPSM) interfaces and compact dimensions (~4.19? × 4.44? × 5.81?) simplify placement under tight counters. Add TOTO’s TLM10 (manual) or TLE05701U (thermostatic) mixing valve when hot and cold blending is required.

Sized Right For Tight Vanities

The small footprint makes routing hoses and service loops easier, even in crowded vanities and ADA-height lavs. Keep clearances per the spout/controller rough-in for tool access.

Smart Compatibility

Designed for TOTO ECOPOWER spouts (e.g., Standard/Standard-R, Axiom, Helix families). Confirm the spout’s spec sheet for controller pairing and any accessory requirements before ordering.

Code-Ready Confidence

Engineered to North American plumbing codes with listings for potable water and low-lead content. Conservation compliance (CEC/CALGreen) helps with permit approvals and sustainability targets.

description.en:
Amazon.com The Eva One-Handle High Arc Bathroom Faucet in oil rubbed bronze (view larger). With optional extension kit (view larger). Offering an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal, Moen's Eva bathroom collection features tapered, sophisticated lines to deliver a look that will never go out of style. This version comes in an oil rubbed bronze finish that delivers a rich, dark brown, old world finish with striking light and dark accents, and it's also available in chrome and brushed nickel. Pair it with other items from Moen's Eva range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories. This Eva one-handle high arc bathroom faucet is designed for single-hole mounting, but it can be used in three-hole installation with its included optional escutcheon. Additionally, it's compatible with the optional A1717 extension kit to add 5-5/8 inches of height for taller sinks. (Without the extension, this Eva faucet has a 4-7/8-inch spout height.) The pivot-action lever style handle controls temperature via its 100-degree arc. This faucet meets WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance. Flow is limited to a maximum of 1.5 gallons per minute (gpm) at 60 PSI, and its laminar stream allows for clear and quiet water flow. It is also ADA compliant. Moen Eco-Performance At Moen, making energy saving improvements along with incorporating sustainable practices into our everyday lives not only saves on energy costs, but also creates a healthier place to live. description.en:
The Moen M-Bition 4-Inch Two-Handle Centerset Lavatory Faucet is a perfect blend of style, functionality, and efficiency for your bathroom. This exquisite bathroom faucet is designed to elevate the aesthetics of any bathroom sink while providing reliable performance. Crafted with a sleek chrome finish, this faucet not only adds a touch of modern elegance to your space but also ensures durability and resistance to corrosion and tarnishing. Whether you're renovating your bathroom or simply upgrading your fixtures, the Moen M-Bition is the ideal choice for those seeking a high-quality bathroom faucet. Engineered for convenience and ease of use, this centerset faucet features a 4-inch design that fits seamlessly into any standard 3-hole bathroom sink. The two-handle operation allows for precise control over water temperature and flow, making it a practical addition to any household. This faucet is designed to conserve water without compromising on performance, making it an eco-friendly option for commercial applications. This bathroom sink faucet is engineered to provide a hassle-free setup, ensuring that you can enjoy its benefits in no time. Its robust construction and high-quality materials guarantee long-lasting performance, making it a wise investment for any public bathroom.



This two-handle lavatory faucet is designed for ease of use. This faucet features a removable plug button in the lift rod hole, copper or brass waterways, 1/2-Inch IPS connections and metal construction with a chrome plated finish for a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look. The 4-Inch wrist blade style handles have hot and cold color indicators, the hot handle has a 1/4 counterclockwise turn to open, and the cold handle has a 1/4 clockwise turn to open. The aerator is limited to a 2.2 gpm maximum flow. This faucet is designed to be installed through two 1-Inch diameter holes on a 4-Inch center set, and comes with vandal resistant screws. The levers are ADA compliant, is certified to ANSI/NSF 61/9 and complies with California Proposition 65. The entire faucet is 12-19/32-Inch wide, 4-5/8-Inch tall and 6-11/64-Inch deep. Moen Commercial offers a full line of faucets, electronic flush valves and showering systems built to withstand the harshest conditions in commercial and institutional buildings and construction. They're built for constant use, and occasional misuse. They're built for the real world.

description.en:
This single-handle metering faucet is designed for ease of use. The metering faucet is designed to deliver either tempered or ambient water, with an ADA-compliant lever-style handle.

The metering mechanism is adjustable, allowing the installer to compensate for supply line pressures of 20 to 80 PSI and the cycle time to be easily adjusted from 5 to 60 seconds. This faucet is factory preset to automatically shut off after 10 seconds at 80 psi. It features 1/2-Inch IPS supply shanks, is vandal resistant, and has a chrome plated brass construction for a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look. The vandal-resistant aerator limits water discharge to a maximum of 0.5 GPM. The metering mechanism is self-contained, which separates it from the potable water supply.

This faucet is designed to be installed through one hole with a 7/8-Inch minimum diameter. It is 1-7/8-Inch wide, with a 6-1/4-Inch depth.

Moen Commercial offers a full line of faucets, electronic flush valves, and showering systems built to withstand the harshest conditions in commercial and institutional buildings. They're built for constant use and occasional misuse. They're built for the real world.

description.en:
The Eva Two-Handle Lavatory Faucet in brushed nickel.
Timeless appeal.
Offering an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal, Moen's Eva bathroom collection features tapered, sophisticated lines to deliver a look that will never go out of style. This Eva two-handle lavatory faucet offers a 4-inch centerset design allows for easy installation and an included metal pop-up drain assembly. Pair it with other items from Moen's Eva range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories.
This version comes in a brushed nickel finish that provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look, and it's also available in chrome and oil rubbed bronze. The handle rotates from 90 degrees to full on either handle: rotate hot side counterclockwise to open and clockwise to close; rotate cold side clockwise to open and counterclockwise to close. This faucet meets WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance. Flow is limited to a maximum of 1.5 gallons per minute (gpm) at 60 PSI, and its laminar stream allows for clear and quiet water flow. It is also ADA compliant. Moen Eco-Performance
At Moen, making energy saving improvements along with incorporating sustainable practices into our everyday lives not only saves on energy costs, but also creates a healthier place to live.
WaterSense is a program sponsored by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to promote water efficiency (it is similar in nature to the EPA's Energy Star program). As of 2009, all Moen lavatory faucets are certified to meet the WaterSense criteria, using up to 32 percent less water while maintaining the same great performance you expect. LifeShine Non-Tarnish Finish
Moen LifeShine finishes are guaranteed not to tarnish, corrode or flake off for life. Developed exclusively by Moen, in collaboration with NASA Glenn Research Center, the LifeShine finish offers enhanced resistance to abrasion, corrosion, and chemical attack. The LifeShine finish is in the surface--not on it--resulting in color stability for the life of the faucet. The Physical Vapor Deposition (PVD) technique helps to eliminate hazardous by-products during the manufacturing process. What Sets Moen Apart?
From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box
Moen 6410 Eva Two-Handle Lavatory Faucet; metal pop-up drain assembly; installation instructions At a Glance 6410 Eva Two-Handle Lavatory Faucet Transitional design that will never go out of style Brushed nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look Maximum flow of 1.5 gpm; WaterSense certified Aerated flow for everyday use 4-inch centerset design Includes metal pop-up drain assembly Limited lifetime warranty

Product Description

Bring timeless elegance to your bathroom with the Moen 6410ORB Eva Two-Handle Centerset Bathroom Faucet in a stunning Oil-Rubbed Bronze finish. Designed to complement both traditional and transitional decor, this faucet features graceful curves and a warm, antiqued appearance that enhances the look of any sink area. The centerset design with a 4-inch spread allows for easy installation, making it an ideal upgrade for your bathroom. Built for effortless operation, the dual lever handles provide precise control over water temperature and flow. The high-arc spout offers ample clearance for washing hands or filling containers, ensuring everyday convenience. Engineered with Moen's WaterSense-certified technology, this faucet is designed to conserve water without compromising performance, helping you reduce water usage while maintaining strong, consistent flow. Constructed from premium materials for durability, this faucet is built to resist tarnish, corrosion, and daily wear. It includes Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty, ensuring long-lasting reliability and peace of mind. Elevate your bathroom with the Moen Eva Bathroom Faucet, where classic beauty meets modern functionality.

description.en:
Amazon.com The Voss high arc bathroom faucet in brushed nickel (view larger). Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features (view larger). Combining elements from traditional and modern styling, Moen's Voss bath collection offers uncomplicated, transitional styling with classic and simple lines that will endure the test of time. This Voss high arc bathroom faucet features crisp edges and a fashion-forward presence as well as a two-handle lever design for easy of use. Pair it with other items from Moen's Voss range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories. This version comes in a brushed nickel finish that provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look, and it's also available in chrome and oil rubbed bronze. It's designed for three-hole installations, from 8 inches to widespread 16 inches. The handle rotates from 90 degrees to full on either handle: rotate hot side counterclockwise to open and clockwise to close; rotate cold side clockwise to open and counterclockwise to close. This faucet meets WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance. Flow is limited to a maximum of 1.5 gallons per minute (gpm) at 60 PSI. It is also ADA compliant. Note that this faucet does not include its required valve (model 9000). Moen Eco-Performance At Moen, green and sustainability are not just words in our vocabulary. Making energy saving improvements along with incorporating sustainable practices into our everyday lives not only saves on energy costs, but also creates a healthier place to live. WaterSense is a program sponsored by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to promote water efficiency (it is similar in nature to the EPA's Energy Star program). As of 2009, all Moen lavatory faucets are certified to meet the WaterSense criteria, using up to 32 percent less water while maintaining the same great performance you expect. M-Pact Common Valve System With Moen, changing your bath and shower faucet style is as easy as changing a light bulb. Install any of Moen's M-Pact-compatible faucets once, and you can upgrade the style at any point in the decorating or construction process--or switch style years down the road--without replacing any faucet plumbing. All changes can be made above the deck or in front of the wall. LifeShine Non-Tarnish Finish Moen LifeShine finishes are guaranteed not to tarnish, corrode or flake off for life. Developed exclusively by Moen, in collaboration with NASA Glenn Research Center, the LifeShine finish offers enhanced resistance to abrasion, corrosion, and chemical attack. The LifeShine finish is in the surface--not on it--resulting in color stability for the life of the faucet. The Physical Vapor Deposition (PVD) technique helps to eliminate hazardous by-products during the manufacturing process. What Sets Moen Apart? From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box Moen T6905 Voss two-handle high arc bathroom faucet; drain assembly; installation instructions At a Glance T6905 Voss Two-Handle High Arc Bathroom Faucet Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features ideal for transitional bathrooms Brushed bronze finish gives a dark golden look with a richly brushed texture Elegant 8-16-inch widespread installation Maximum flow of 1.5 gpm; WaterSense certified Includes pop-up metal drain assembly Does not include valve Limited lifetime warranty Product Description Transform your bathroom into a sanctuary of style and functionality with the Moen Voss Two-Handle Widespread Bathroom Faucet. Designed with a transitional style that seamlessly blends with any decor, this exquisite faucet is the perfect addition to your vanity. Crafted with precision, the brushed nickel finish not only adds a touch of elegance but also ensures durability and resistance to water spots and fingerprints, keeping your bathroom looking pristine. Whether you're updating your bath or completing a new build, this faucet is the ideal choice for those who appreciate both form and function. The Moen Voss faucet is engineered for a three-hole application, making it a versatile choice for various sink and countertop configurations. Its low-arc design provides a sleek and modern look, while the two-handle operation allows for precise control over water temperature and flow. With its superior craftsmanship and thoughtful design, this faucet is more than just a fixture; it's a statement piece that elevates the entire aesthetic of your bathroom. It is backed by Moen's limited lifetime warranty. From the Manufacturer Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features give the Voss collection an ageless, yet fashion-forward, presence. Each silhouette brings a confident transitional style to the bath.

  • HIGH ARC SPOUT: The Moen Voss widespread bathroom faucet boasts an elegant high-arc spout, providing ample clearance for handwashing and other bathroom tasks
  • WARM AND INVITING: Brushed Nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm-gray metallic look
  • VALVE REQUIRED: This trim kit requires Moen valve 9000 to complete installation
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Can be installed between 8" to 16" for a more customized widespread installation

description.en:
The TOTO LF 1.2 GPM Single Handle Vessel Bathroom Sink Faucet is designed for everyday use in mind. The spout is more compact with just the right sense of presence, yet provides ample flow and volume. The single lever allows for complete control over water volume and temperature. The LF faucet uses low-conductivity materials for parts that comes into contact with the handle. This safe design inhibits the heat flow, keeping the handle from getting too warm. The WaterSense certified, high-efficiency 1.2 GPM water flow saves water without diminishing the performance of the faucet. The faucet is ADA, CEC, and CALGreen compliant. Included items: Spout and handle, metal pop-up drain and rod, and water supply hoses.

  • A SMOOTH OPERATOR - The faucet features a ceramic disc valve that glides back and forth, moderating water flow while protecting against wear. A lifetime of smooth handle control at your fingertips.
  • LUXURY EXEMPLIFIED - For over 100 years, TOTO has made a reputation for using the finest quality materials. Faucet spouts and handles are solid metal and feature a durable finish. NEVER WORRY ABOUT TOUCHING A HOT HANDLE - Safe, low-conductivity materials are selected to prevent handles from getting too warm.
  • SIMPLE INSTALLATION - Installation is a breeze with the included water supply hoses. The faucet can be installed into a single-hole deck or a 3 hole configuration with the purchase of a separately sold cover plate.
  • WATER SAVINGS WITHOUT SACRIFICING PERFORMANCE - The WaterSense certified and CEC compliant faucet uses 1.2 gallons of water per minute, offering water savings with no compromise to your shower experience. The Faucet is ADA compliant.
  • LIFETIME WARRANTY - Install with confidence knowing your faucet is backed by TOTO's limited lifetime warranty.

The smooth and sophisticated lines of the TOTO LB 1.2 GPM Single Handle Vessel Bathroom Sink Faucet create a modern twist on a classic design. The single lever allows for complete control over water volume and temperature. The LB faucet uses low-conductivity materials for parts that come into contact with the handle, providing a safe design that inhibits the heat flow and keeps the handle from getting too warm. The WaterSense certified, high-efficiency 1.2 GPM water flow saves water without diminishing the performance of the faucet. The faucet is ADA, CEC, and CALGreen compliant.   • A SMOOTH OPERATOR - The faucet features a ceramic disc valve that glides back and forth, moderating water flow while protecting against wear. A lifetime of smooth handle control at your fingertips.

  • SIMPLE INSTALLATION - Installation is a breeze with the included water supply hoses. The faucet can be installed into a single-hole deck or a 3 hole configuration with the purchase of a separately sold cover plate.
  • WATER SAVINGS WITHOUT SACRIFICING PERFORMANCE - The WaterSense certified and CEC compliant faucet uses 1.2 gallons of water per minute, offering water savings with no compromise to your shower experience. The Faucet is ADA compliant.

description.en:
The TOTO Helix Vessel ECOPOWER or AC 0.5 GPM Touchless Bathroom Faucet Spout, 10 Second On-Demand Flow is ideal for high-traffic spaces, providing an elegant water conservation solution. The sensor is strategically positioned underneath the spout head to accurately sense the hands for touchless use. The 0.5 GPM 10 second on-demand faucet uses only 0.08 gallons per cycle and is CEC and CALGreen compliant. The on-demand system means that water flows only when needed and cannot be accidentally left running. When hands are present, the water will flow, and when hands are removed, the water will stop. The ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience while saving water. The spout works with your selection of compatible TOTO ECOPOWER or AC controller systems. Included items: spout only. Purchased separately: Compatible TOTO ECOPOWER or AC operating controller, water supply line for G 1/2 inch connection, and optional mixing valve

  • Equipped with a 0.5 GPM water-saving flow rate
  • 10 second on-demand water flow; uses only 0.08 gallons per cycle
  • ECO CAP aerating technology balances the amount of air bubbles in the water for a comfortable experience

description.en:
Elevate Your Vanity with the Hansgrohe 31083821 Metris Widespread Bathroom Faucet — Brushed Nickel

Bring clean, modern lines and smooth, precise control to your vanity with the Hansgrohe Metris 31083821 widespread faucet. The gently arched spout offers comfortable clearance for daily routines, while metal lever handles and ceramic cartridges deliver drip-free, effortless operation. Finished in Brushed Nickel, it pairs easily with contemporary bath hardware and installs on standard 3-hole sinks for a fast, refined upgrade.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 31083821
  • Type: Two-handle widespread bathroom faucet (3-hole)
  • Size/Capacity: Low-flow lavatory faucet (flow rate see spec sheet)
  • Material/Finish: Brass construction; Brushed Nickel finish
  • Performance: Durable ceramic disc cartridges for smooth, leak-resistant control
  • Connections/Fit: 3-hole deck mount; widespread 8″–16″ adjustable centers
  • Dimensions: Spout reach/height are layout-dependent (see installation manual)
  • Included: Faucet with handles and spout; coordinating drain assembly typically included (see manual)
  • Certifications/Compliance: WaterSense/lead-free compliance per model spec; ADA lever handles
  • Warranty: Hansgrohe limited warranty (see terms)

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

Quarter-turn ceramic cartridges provide precise temperature mixing and a consistent, light handle feel—ideal for busy family baths and guest suites.

Clean, Modern Design

The Metris profile offers a minimalist silhouette and a comfortable spout height that helps reduce splash while keeping plenty of room for handwashing.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

A solid brass body with a Brushed Nickel finish stands up to daily cleaning and resists fingerprints for a refined look with minimal upkeep.

Installer-Friendly Widespread Fit

Designed for standard 3-hole sinks and vanity tops, the adjustable 8″–16″ centers make retrofits and new installs straightforward.

Sized Right For Your Vanity

Balanced spout reach and height (see manual) fit a range of bowl sizes without crowding the deck—great for single or double vanities.

Complete The Look

Pair with matching Hansgrohe shower and accessory finishes in Brushed Nickel for a cohesive bath design from sink to shower.

Elevate Your Bathroom with the Hansgrohe 31073831 Metris C Widespread Bathroom Faucet — Polished Nickel

Blend classic curves with modern performance. The Hansgrohe Metris C 31073831 brings a timeless, gently arched spout and metal lever handles to your vanity, finished in luminous Polished Nickel. Smooth ceramic disc cartridges deliver precise, drip-resistant control, and the adjustable widespread layout fits standard 3-hole sinks—ideal for refresh projects or new builds seeking a coordinated, upscale look.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 31073831
  • Type: Two-handle widespread bathroom faucet (3-hole deck mount)
  • Size/Capacity: Lavatory flow rate see spec sheet (WaterSense listing varies by version)
  • Material/Finish: Brass construction; Polished Nickel finish
  • Performance: Quarter-turn ceramic disc cartridges for smooth, leak-resistant operation
  • Connections/Fit: Adjustable 8″–16″ centers; standard supply connections
  • Dimensions: Spout height & reach are layout-dependent (see installation manual)
  • Included: Faucet with handles and spout; coordinating drain assembly typically included (see manual)
  • Certifications/Compliance: Lead-free; ADA lever handles; WaterSense per model spec
  • Warranty: Hansgrohe limited warranty (manufacturer)

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

Precision ceramic cartridges provide consistent temperature and flow control with a light, reliable handle feel—great for family baths and guest suites alike.

Timeless Design, Easy Pairing

The Metris C silhouette blends classic and transitional styles, making finish matching simple across hardware, lighting, and accessories in Polished Nickel.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

A solid brass body and resilient finish stand up to daily cleaning and resist fingerprints, keeping the faucet looking fresh with minimal upkeep.

Installer-Friendly Widespread Fit

Adjustable 8″–16″ centers simplify retrofits and new installs. Standard connections integrate cleanly with typical lav supplies for a straightforward setup.

Sized Right For Your Vanity
